subcodes.first_line: In this day must the friends of God appear with such a light that the world may be illumined by it, and be set ablaze with such a fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز باید دوستان الهی به نوری ظاهر باشند که عالم از او منور گردد و به ناری مشتعل
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @high station of the true believer, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @consultation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
